title: cephaelis acuta
intro: Cephaelis acuta, also known as the white dragon flower or dragon flower, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antipyretic properties, making it effective in treating fever, headaches, and body aches. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of isoquinoline alkaloids, which have been shown to have pain-relieving and fever-reducing effects. Cephaelis acuta can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
